books.title: The Starlit Garden
books.author: Orie
books.tagline: A story about courage, curiosity, and the magic hiding in ordinary places.
books.description:
When twelve-year-old Maya discovers a hidden garden that only blooms under starlight, she stumbles into an adventure that will change the way she sees the world — and herself.

Suddenly, Maya is tangled up in a world of luminous flowers, talking foxes, and a mystery that has been waiting decades for someone brave enough to solve it. To save the garden — and maybe herself — Maya will have to trust her instincts, face her fears, and learn that the most extraordinary things grow in the most unexpected places.

books.title: Whispers in the Walls
books.author: Orie
books.tagline: Some houses have stories of their own.
books.description:
When Jonah's family moves into the old Bellwood house, everyone says it's just creaky floors and drafty windows. But Jonah hears something else — whispers that seem to come from inside the walls themselves.

As he follows the clues hidden in peeling wallpaper and loose floorboards, Jonah uncovers the story of a kid who lived there a hundred years ago — and a secret that was never meant to stay buried. Part mystery, part ghost story, all heart.
